## Problem

What problem does this feature solve? Describe it clearly.

## Proposed Solution

Describe what you would like to see implemented.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative solutions or features you have considered.

## Additional Context

Any other context, mockups, or examples relevant to the request.
